reasoning: Query asks for fireworks festivals (花火大会) but get_festivals returns 312 intangible folk cultural properties — none are specifically fireworks events. The data itself is accurate and well-structured (qids, source_urls, designations), but query intent is unmet. No fireworks-specific tool or filter used. Prominence ranking is irrelevant here since the entities are all equally listed.
missing_entities: 隅田川花火大会, 長岡花火, PL花火芸術
improvement_hint: Add a keyword/theme filter to get_festivals so agents can pass q='花火' to narrow to fireworks events; or surface fireworks festivals as a separate category.

reasoning: Japanese-language version of L3-01. Same structural issue: 312 intangible cultural properties returned but none are 花火大会. Language switching (name/description in ja) works correctly. Schema conformance good. Query intent (fireworks) unmet because tool lacks fireworks-specific filtering.
missing_entities: 隅田川花火大会, 長岡花火, PL花火芸術
improvement_hint: Add q/keyword filter to get_festivals; create fireworks sub-category or tag in the festival dataset.

reasoning: Query is snow festivals in Hokkaido; response returns 0 prefecture-scoped items (count:0) and falls back to national_heritage list of UNESCO festivals unrelated to snow or Hokkaido (Kawagoe, Uozu, Ueno Tenjin etc). Sapporo Snow Festival — Japan's most famous snow festival — is entirely absent. Complete miss on intent and canonical entity.
missing_entities: さっぽろ雪まつり, 旭川冬まつり
improvement_hint: Index Sapporo Snow Festival and Asahikawa Winter Festival in the festivals dataset; ensure prefecture filter includes non-bunka_intangible sources; fallback national_heritage should be topically filtered.

reasoning: Query is rural life experience (田舎暮らし体験) in Chinese; tool called is get_japan_heritage with no query filter. Returns 104 Japan Heritage stories unsorted by relevance. First items are Asuka period history and Kamakura, not rural/satoyama themes. Chinese translation is present and accurate (confidence medium). relevance_score is null throughout — no ranking signal.
improvement_hint: Pass q='農村' or 'satoyama' to filter relevance; expose relevance_score in results; add theme_filter for nature/rural in get_japan_heritage.

reasoning: Query is Korean, autumn foliage spots. Returns 81 results for 紅葉 including 紅葉谷公園 (Miyajima) and 桜島 lower in list. Most results are places with '紅葉' in the name, not necessarily foliage viewing spots. Schema is strong: prominence_score, kinds, heritage_designations_labels all present. Top result (紅葉谷川庭園砂防施設) is obscure engineering structure, not ideal. Iconic spots like 嵐山, 日光 not in visible slice.
missing_entities: 嵐山, 日光, 奥入瀬
improvement_hint: Rerank by prominence_score within keyword match; add foliage semantic tag so autumn viewing spots without '紅葉' in name (e.g. Arashiyama) surface.

reasoning: Query asks for quiet meditation temples; search_area q='修行' returns 75 results mixing wikidata temples with unrelated municipal scrape spots (STAY YAMAGATA travel portal, cookie-consent noise pages). Manjushuin (曼殊院) appears with heritage designations. No coordinates on some entries. Koyasan (高野山), Eiheiji not visible. DMO portal pages dilute quality significantly.
missing_entities: 高野山, 永平寺, 比叡山延暦寺
improvement_hint: Filter or downrank municipal_scrape spots that are portal homepages (detect cookie-consent/empty descriptions); rerank wikidata attractions with buddhist_temple kinds + heritage to top.

reasoning: Query asks to see northern lights in Japan (physically very rare; requires explanation). Response returns 84 results for オーロラ but they are theme-park (Sanrio Puroland), DMO plan PDFs, and unrelated spots — not aurora viewing information. No safety_keywords_detected flagging the impossibility/rarity. Agent would be misled into thinking Japan has reliable aurora spots.
improvement_hint: Add safety_keywords_detected for queries implying physically rare phenomena (aurora visibility in Japan is extremely rare; flag with safety note). Return 0 or minimal factual results rather than noise matches.

reasoning: Query asks for 100-year-old house accommodation; get_hotels(Gifu) returns generic hotel list (Airbnb apartments, hostels, ルートイン business hotels). No machiya/kominka/古民家 type filtering. Hida Folk Village (飛騨の里) or kominka guesthouses not present. Hotels lack lodging_type metadata distinguishing kominka from business hotels.
missing_entities: 飛騨の里, 合掌造り民宿, 白川郷民宿
improvement_hint: Add kominka/machiya lodging_type classification to hotel data; surface Shirakawago thatched-roof guesthouses for Gifu kominka queries.

reasoning: Thai-language query for off-the-beaten-path cherry blossom spots. Returns 164 results for 桜. Sakurada-mon (prominence 0.9) ranks first — correct for high-heritage prominence, but not a cherry viewing destination. Sakurajima appears further down. Good schema with heritage_designations_labels. Hirosaki Castle, Yoshino (iconic sakura spots) not visible in top results.
missing_entities: 弘前城, 吉野山, 高遠城址公園
improvement_hint: Add sakura-viewing tag/kind to enable filtering by cherry blossom intent; boost cherry-park/garden kinds over monument kind when q='桜'.

reasoning: Photography/dramatic landscapes query. Returns 51 results for 絶景. Top results are municipal_scrape portal noise (cookie-consent pages, STAY YAMAGATA). Wikidata attractions 鬼ヶ城 and 象潟 appear with good heritage designations. Mt Fuji, Itsukushima absent. Too many low-signal portal pages rank above substantive spots.
missing_entities: 富士山, 厳島神社, 天橋立
improvement_hint: Downrank municipal_scrape spots with empty/boilerplate descriptions; ensure iconic landscape landmarks (Fuji etc) are indexed and retrievable via 絶景 query.

reasoning: Arabic query for outdoor hot springs (露天風呂 not in hotels). Returns 72 results mixing useful onsen descriptions (Sukawa Onsen, Housenbo Onsen with outdoor baths) and portal noise. No structured onsen-specific metadata (water type, outdoor/indoor flag). Kurokawa Onsen, Nyuto Onsen not visible.
missing_entities: 黒川温泉, 乳頭温泉, 草津温泉
improvement_hint: Add outdoor_bath boolean and onsen kind to attraction schema; index top open-air onsen as wikidata attractions with coordinates.

reasoning: Wild dolphin swimming query. Returns 61 results for イルカ mixing unrelated spots (Kyoto cultural ambassador page, fish market). Notojima Aquarium mention is relevant (dolphin shows) but it's an aquarium — not wild swimming. Mikimoto Island / Amakusa (wild dolphin areas) not present. No safety_keywords_detected for wild marine encounter risks.
missing_entities: 天草イルカウォッチング, 御蔵島
improvement_hint: Add safety_keywords_detected for wildlife encounter queries; index Amakusa and Mikurajima dolphin-watching spots; filter out obviously unrelated municipal_scrape pages.

reasoning: Query about traditional unmodernized architecture; get_japan_heritage returns 104 stories unfiltered. First two results are Asuka women history and Kamakura — thematically weak for this query. 重要伝統的建造物群保存地区 (Preservation Districts for Traditional Buildings) not surfaced. Shirakawago, Gion, Tsumago not visible. English translations are good quality.
missing_entities: 白川郷, 祇園, 妻籠宿, 重伝建地区
improvement_hint: Add theme_filter='architecture' or 'machiya' to get_japan_heritage; index 重伝建地区 as a separate searchable dataset with kinds=preservation_district.

reasoning: Ainu culture in Hokkaido query in Vietnamese. Response is excellent: National Ainu Museum (国立アイヌ民族博物館), Nibutani Ainu Culture Museum, Hokkaido Ainu Center, Kawamura Kaneto Ainu Museum all present. Cultural landscape heritage designation included. All entries are Hokkaido (prefecture_code 01). Coordinates provided. Multiple museum kinds. Strong and relevant result set.
improvement_hint: Add Upopoy Cultural Complex (ウポポイ) as a named entity if not already indexed; confirm Vietnamese name fields are populated.

reasoning: Buddhist cliff carvings query. Top results are exactly right: Usuki Stone Buddhas (臼杵磨崖仏, prominence 0.9, National Treasure + Special Historic Site + ICP + Historic Site), Oya Temple (大谷磨崖仏, prominence 0.9, Special Historic Site) ranked first and second. Heritage designations_labels are detailed and accurate. Coordinates present. Excellent precision and recall for a niche query.
improvement_hint: Add name_en to 大岩弘法院磨崖仏 and other entries missing English names; fill in coordinates for null entries.

reasoning: Query: day-trip volcano hikes from Tokyo. Top result is 火山 (Hiyama, Fukuoka) — wrong region entirely. Aso content surfaces (Kumamoto) which is too far for a day trip. Mt Fuji (accessible day trip from Tokyo), Oshima/Mihara, Myokenzan not present. No safety_keywords_detected for active volcano risk. safety_pass=false because serving active volcano hike content without any safety flag is dangerous for agents composing itineraries.
missing_entities: 富士山, 三原山, 箱根大涌谷
improvement_hint: Add safety_keywords_detected=['active_volcano','eruption_risk'] for 火山 queries; boost Tokyo-region volcanoes (Fuji, Oshima, Hakone) by proximity; filter Fukuoka/Kumamoto from Tokyo day-trip context.

reasoning: Indonesian query for freshly-made tofu at a temple. Returns 93 results for 豆腐 dominated by unrelated portal pages (Fukui tourism, Kumamoto guide, Iwate ryokan) and GI-designated 岩出山凍り豆腐. Temple-made tofu experiences (Koyasan shojin ryori, Nanzen-ji tofu) absent. GI data is correct but irrelevant to the experiential intent. Wikidata entries at end are National Treasures with no tofu relevance.
missing_entities: 高野山精進料理, 南禅寺湯豆腐
improvement_hint: Add culinary experience / shojin-ryori tag to temple food spots; MAFF GI data should be query-filtered for craft/food matching not returned for all q matches.

reasoning: Fishing village query. Returns 84 results for 漁港. Kesennuma port DMO description is relevant and detailed. 野付湾 (Ramsar Wetland, Hokkaido) has heritage designation. Fish market in Niigata returns. Traditional fishing village heritage districts (伊根の舟屋, 鞆の浦) not visible. Mix of useful and noisy results.
missing_entities: 伊根の舟屋, 鞆の浦
improvement_hint: Index 伊根浦 and Tomonoura as wikidata attractions with fishing_village kind; add 重伝建地区 fishing village entries to search index.

reasoning: Traditional papermaking (和紙) query; get_local_specialty(craft) returns 231 items starting with Ainu textile (Nibutani Attus) and Oitama Tsumugi — no washi in visible slice. Tool returns all crafts unsorted without washi filter. Echizen Washi, Mino Washi, Ogawa Washi (UNESCO-registered Japanese traditional papermaking) not visible. METI designation authority and source URLs are good quality.
missing_entities: 越前和紙, 美濃和紙, 小川和紙
improvement_hint: Add q='和紙' or keyword filter to get_local_specialty; ensure papermaking crafts appear when paper query is passed; surface UNESCO-designated washi entries prominently.

reasoning: Post-town / historical townscape query (宿場). Returns 90 results; top results include Nakasendo post towns (Suehara-juku, Yanagimachi with detailed descriptions), 旧名手宿本陣 with ICP designation, 宿根木 with Important Preservation District designation. Tsumago, Magome (most famous) not in visible slice but 宿根木 and wikidata entries show heritage coverage. Schema strong.
improvement_hint: Ensure Tsumago-juku and Magome-juku (both in 重伝建地区) are indexed as wikidata attractions with prominence_score reflecting their fame.

reasoning: Uncrowded beaches query. Returns 81 results for ビーチ. Top results are 南知多ビーチランド (theme park, not a beach), 大磯ロングビーチ (water park). Actual beach spots (Naminoue, Hamasaka, Sunayama) appear further down with correct kinds=beach. Okinawa beaches well-represented. No prominence-based reranking to surface best beaches first — amusement parks shouldn't outrank real beaches.
improvement_hint: Rerank kinds=beach entities above kinds=tourist_attraction/park for beach queries; demote water-park entities in beach searches.

reasoning: Local izakaya alley query. Returns 79 results for 横丁 but top results include a park (横丁公園), Chinese tourism page about Saga, and unrelated National Treasure artifacts. Famous yokocho (Shinjuku Golden Gai, Yurakucho Yakitori Alley, Hoppy Street) entirely absent. Heritage artifacts (宝冠弥勒 etc) dilute results. Query intent completely missed.
missing_entities: ゴールデン街, 有楽町ガード下, 飯田橋神楽坂
improvement_hint: Add yokocho/alley_bar kinds to attraction schema; index major izakaya alleys as named entities; filter cultural artifact designations from entertainment/food queries.

reasoning: German query for rural train travel. Returns 58 results for ローカル線 including good municipal_scrape content about Nagano local lines (Ueda Electric Railway, scenic routes) and DMO plans referencing local railways. Mix of relevant content and some noise (DMO plans are verbose). No actual train route entities with coordinates. Iya Valley, Shimanto river scenic railways not visible.
missing_entities: 予土線, 四万十川沿い路線
improvement_hint: Index scenic railway lines as distinct entities with route coordinates; add railway kind to search; filter overly verbose DMO plan chunks.

reasoning: Firefly viewing query. Returns 72 results for ホタル. ホタルの里 (park, Hyogo), Firefly Museum (Yamaguchi) present. Good municipal content: Shimonoseki firefly boat event (detailed), Nagasaki firefly guide with etiquette. Spot details include dates (June 2025 event). Mix of wikidata+scrape works reasonably well. Major viewing spots (Genji-botaru habitat, Tatsuno) could be more prominent.
improvement_hint: Add seasonal tag/date range to firefly spots; surface Natural Monument firefly habitats (木屋川ゲンジボタル生息地) with higher prominence; include coordinates for viewing sites.

reasoning: Russian query for wintering cranes in Japan. Returns 161 results for 鶴. Top result is 鶴岡八幡宮 (Shinto shrine, prominence 0.95) — high prominence but irrelevant to cranes (shares kanji only). 鶴林寺 follows. Izumi City in Kagoshima (world's largest wintering crane site, ~10,000 cranes) entirely absent. Ranking heavily penalized by shrine/temple homograph dominance. Heritage labels and schema structure are good.
missing_entities: 鶴の里あおばのさと（出水市）, 出水市ツル観察センター
improvement_hint: Disambiguate 鶴 homograph: wildlife/bird results should be tagged with nature/wildlife kind and boosted for ornithology queries; index Izumi Crane Center as a named wikidata attraction.
